title: Introduces California Broadband Infrastructure and Distance Learning Bond Act 2020 to help students with distance learning

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The COVID-19 pandemic has adversely affected California's budget, leading to a sharp downturn in tax revenues.",
    "Over 4.5 million Californians are currently unemployed due to the COVID-19 crisis.",
    "Most public school students in California are learning remotely as a result of the pandemic.",
    "Some school districts in California lack the broadband infrastructure necessary to support remote learning.",
    "There are insufficient funds in California's budget to close the digital divide affecting students in rural areas.",
    "The California Broadband Infrastructure and Distance Learning Bond Act of 2020 aims to invest in broadband infrastructure, particularly in rural areas.",
    "Investing in broadband infrastructure is seen as critical for the state's economic recovery and for providing access to the internet for all."
  ]
}
```
